results.preview: ※ KTX 소요 시간과 운임은 철도청의 사정에 따라 변동할 수 있습니다. | KTX 노선도 | 서울 | 용산 | 광명
Creating Linux Virtual Servers | Wensong Zhang, Shiyao Jin, Quanyuan Wu | National Laboratory for Parallel & Distributed Processing

candidates.name: hwp2md
candidates.decision: not adopted as an app runtime dependency because CareVault is not ready to take GPL runtime dependency obligations

adoption.fail_closed_behavior: The app keeps filename/path attachment metadata first. If parser invocation fails or returns no readable text, parsing status reports failure and the attachment reference remains intact.
adoption.browser_boundary: Browser file-input .hwp remains filename-reference only; browser-side .hwpx still uses the lightweight ZIP preview/XML extractor.

tauri_command_boundary_gate.default_behavior: Skips external download when CAREVAULT_HWP_SAMPLE_URL is not set, so default cargo test remains offline-stable.
tauri_command_boundary_gate.result: passed through parse_hwp_attachment_text and recovered expected KTX terms

verification: npm test -- src/documentTauriAttachmentParsing.test.ts src/documentAttachmentParsing.test.ts src/documentAttachmentText.test.ts src/documentHwpxText.test.ts src/documentKnowledge.test.ts src/documentFilterActions.test.ts
